series_metadata.series_description: Case file compiled when the State of Ohio is a lien holder in a foreclosure case. Can include, but is not limited to, the complaint, the AGO answer, correspondence, and copies of pleadings and other documents submitted by parties in the case.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: from opening of case or 1 year AGO disclaims interest, whichever is earlier. Transient documents can be deleted when they are no longer of administrative value. ; Paper: scanned or transient records are no longer administrative value
